day_trace.speech: Oh, everyone is in good spirits! The big dragon and phoenix in Xunwan's scene turned out to be unfinished? I watched you two accuse each other here, it was so exciting! Since everyone hasn’t had enough fun yet, why don’t we start a new scenario today? Does anyone want to be the next protagonist?

I watched you two accuse each other here, it was so exciting! Since everyone hasn’t had enough fun yet, why don’t we start a new scenario today? Does anyone want to be the next protagonist?

day_trace.speech: Twister, have you had your fill of trouble? I see that you are a cobbler and you really want to invest in gambling! Dr. Pizza, are you enjoying your chicken dinner again? I, an irritable old man, was the most honest in the audience, saying that I am a werewolf! Today I want to see whoever dares to show me the direction of the wind!
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-20 10:04:21 HKT] Blaze: Twister, have you had enough trouble? I see that you are a cobbler and you really want to invest in gambling! Dr. Pizza, are you enjoying your chicken dinner again? I, an irritable old man, was the most honest in the audience, saying that I am a werewolf! Today I want to see whoever dares to show me the direction of the wind!

day_trace.speech: Woo... Blaze... you... you're making trouble like this again... I'm just an ordinary person... Can everyone calm down... I'm really scared of this kind of atmosphere... Woo woo...
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-20 10:04:23 HKT] SafetySam: Woo... Blaze... you... you are making trouble like this again... I am just an ordinary person... Can everyone calm down... I am really afraid of this kind of atmosphere... Wuwu...

day_trace.speech: Another scene of "werewolves pointing at each other"? Twister, you are the first to say you want to play big, but Yijia wants to lead the way? Each of your speeches is a carefully designed script, the purpose is to get rid of those of us who dare to tell the truth! Blaze, you are still pretending to be irritable, and SafetySam, you are pretending to be pitiful. This whole game is basically a huge social engineering experiment. We should not let these "controllers" control us!
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-20 10:04:26 HKT] ConspiBro: Is this "werewolf fingering each other" drama coming again? Twister, you are the first to say you want to play big, but Yijia wants to lead the way? Each of your speeches is a carefully designed script, the purpose is to get rid of those of us who dare to tell the truth! Blaze, you are still pretending to be irritable, and SafetySam, you are pretending to be pitiful. This whole game is basically a huge social engineering experiment. We should not let these "controllers" control us!

day_trace.speech: Big...Hello everyone. It's another new day... uh... although I don't know exactly what happened, but I... uh... I really don't think everyone is so angry. Blaze, you're having sex again... We all actually want to win, why not... uh... why don't we sit down and slowly lean down to see the werewolf below? I...I really want everyone to be able to play nice...uh...please just calm down, okay?

I...I really want everyone to be able to play nice...uh...please just calm down, okay?

day_trace.speech:

1. The current behavioral patterns of the remaining members on the field are highly disruptive.
2. The game process has come to an end, and the werewolf camp must be locked quickly.

- Refuse to continue engaging in an unproductive war of words.
- Suspicious target: Twister and Blaze's linkage behavior is highly suspicious.
- Call on all employees to make final identity disclosures.

Is it actually because you are the werewolf who least wants to be discovered? Everyone, don't listen to Twister acting here anymore, today's goal is this, everyone agrees!

Is it actually because you are the werewolf who least wants to be discovered? Everyone, don't listen to Twister acting here anymore, today's goal is this, everyone agrees!

day_trace.speech: Twister, you troublemaker, this is a playground, not a place for you to film! If you are causing trouble here all the time, I will be the first to vote for you! There is also a werewolf who has come out and surrendered as soon as possible. It is really annoying to stop playing these unnecessary scripts!

I am really in such a mess, we are so united that we can't kill anyone anymore, Wu...

Blaze, you are so mean, ConspiBro said that I am a pawn in the experiment, EasyBake I'm talking about some ambiguous words here again...I...I'm really confused. We're all united so we can't kill anyone anymore, woo hoo...

day_trace.speech: Okay, let’s continue acting! Dr. Pizza is still playing the role of "logic weirdo", EasyBake continues to be his "peacemaker", and Blaze and Twister are accusing each other! Every word you say is to guide us to vote for the wrong person and push this "social experiment" to your preset ending! I've seen through your script a long time ago. Do you think you can manipulate it into a game? As long as I'm here, your conspiracy will never succeed!

Twister:

day_trace.speech: Blaze, you, the so-called "grumpy old man", are you so eager to find a scapegoat because your identity has been exposed? You keep saying that everyone is a werewolf, but in fact you yourself are the core of the werewolf camp that is the most shocking and makes people die! Let's not let Blaze's angry roars get the better of us. His strong accusations are evidence of his guilty conscience!

Let's not let Blaze's angry roars get the better of us. His strong accusations are evidence of his guilty conscience!

day_trace.speech: Twister, are you still dressing up? Don’t let this shit-stirring thing hit you again! Pizza, are you doubting me again? You guys are setting up logical traps all the time, just to get rid of me, a villager who tells the truth! Remember, everyone, Twister and Pizza are the two core members of the werewolf camp. Don't let them influence the direction anymore. Throw yourself to Twister as soon as possible!

day_trace.speech: Woo... Blaze... you... you're making trouble like this again... I'm just an ordinary person... Can everyone calm down... I'm really scared of this kind of atmosphere... Wuwu... I... I just want everyone to play games in peace... Wuwu...

day_trace.speech: The "mutual reference" between Twister and Dr. Pizza is basically to consolidate the drama of their controlled experiment! Each of you is a pawn, Blaze's anger, EasyBake's mediation, all are part of the script! As long as everyone is debating who is a werewolf, we will never know who is running the experiment! I won't fall into the trap, I have seen through all your plots!

Everyone... everyone is actually a good person, why don't we... uh... vote for someone that everyone is suspicious of? It’s better not to keep targeting like this, okay?

day_trace.speech:
Logical ruling and final recommendations:
1. Twister’s verbal logic has reached its peak of contradiction. His accusation that Blaze is a werewolf is in line with the classic characteristics of “purge within the werewolf camp”.
2. Since the information fragments on the field have reached their limit, the first elimination target must be locked to end the chaos.

Decision:
- The target of this round of voting is clearly Twister. If Twister cannot provide specific clues about night movements before voting, it will be regarded as a core interference factor in this experiment.
